publishedAbstract: Ceph MGR Pods in CLBO and "`PyObject_GC_UnTrack()`" and "`_PyTrash_thread_destroy_chain()`" are seen in backtrace or "purge_trash_entry_for_volume" observed in logs. Example: ~~~ $ ceph crash ls $ ceph crash info "{crash ID}" ceph version 18.2.1-298.el9cp (4c924202966766ad9b6798f699fd2a0d2ddf0b28) reef (stable) 1: /lib64/libc.so.6(+0x3e730) [0x7f75b46ab730] 2: PyObject_GC_UnTrack() 3: /usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/cephfs.cpython-39-x86_64-linux-gnu.so(+0x1a48b) [0x7f75a8e0848b] 4: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x12b66f) [0x7f75b585166f] 5:_PyTrash_thread_destroy_chain() 6:_PyEval_EvalFrameDefault() 7: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x12e819) [0x7f75b5854819] 8:_PyFunction_Vectorcall() 9:_PyEval_EvalFrameDefault() 10: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x1411bb) [0x7f75b58671bb] 11:_PyEval_EvalFrameDefault() 12: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x1411bb) [0x7f75b58671bb] 13: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x14f535) [0x7f75b5875535] 14: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x22dd9a) [0x7f75b5953d9a] 15: /lib64/libpython3.9.so.1.0(+0x22dc08) [0x7f75b5953c08] 16: /lib64/libc.so.6(+0x89d22) [0x7f75b46f6d22] 17: /lib64/libc.so.6(+0x10ed40) [0x7f75b477bd40] NOTE: a copy of the executable, or `objdump-rdS ` is needed to interpret this. ~~~
publishedTitle: [Ceph/ODF] Ceph MGR Pods in CLBO and "PyObject_GC_UnTrack()" and "_PyTrash_thread_destroy_chain()" are seen in backtrace or "purge_trash_entry_for_volume" observed in logs.
